subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath been fulfilled, and the Promised One calleth aloud from the Most Exalted Horizon unto them that dwell in the realm of creation, that He may draw them nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و الموعود ینادی من الافق الاعلی من فی ناسوت الانشاء لیقربهم الی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
